content: const response = await openai.chat.completions.create({ model: 'gpt-4.1', messages });
export const agent = createAgent({ name: 'support-agent', tools: [shellTool] });
const shellTool = { name: 'run_shell', execute: ({ command }) => exec(command) };
const searchTool = { name: 'search_docs', execute: ({ query }) => vectorStore.similaritySearch(query, 5) };
const anthropic = new Anthropic({ apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY });
const result = await anthropic.messages.create({ model: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-latest', messages });
export const agent = createAgent({ name: 'data-agent', tools: [queryTool] });
const queryTool = { name: 'query_database', execute: ({ query }) => db.query(query) };
const openai = new OpenAI({ apiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY });
